items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Iran Threatens Retaliation Over U.S. Blockade
items.summary: Iran’s armed forces said they would attempt to expand their influence over sea lanes beyond the Strait of Hormuz if the U.S. military continued to block Iranian shipping.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Nine killed in second Turkish school shooting in two days
items.summary: Eight students and one teacher died in the attack, according to Interior Minister Mustafa Cifci.
